title: [ImportVerilog] Add if and loop statements
body: Extend the `ImportVerilog` conversion to support `if` statements and `for`, `repeat`, `while`, `do ... while`, and `forever` loops. Lower them to `scf.if` and `scf.while` ops for now. In the future, since Verilog has `break`, `continue`, and `return` statements, we may have to switch to a different dialect or defined these ops in the Moore dialect.
